payload.text: Reviewer Agent score: plausibility 0.95 · evidence 0.30 · scope 0.20 · duplicate-risk 0.70. Trivially true statement that BACE1 has substrates beyond APP — too broad to count as a finding. Concerns: Claim is textbook-level, not a candidate finding; No specific substrates named (e.g., Neuregulin-1, Seizure protein 6); Quote is vague paraphrase; High duplicate risk.

decision_reason: Reviewer Agent score note. Informational metadata about a sibling proposal; no state risk.
